description: Detects buffer overflow risks in C++: strcpy/strcat/sprintf/gets/wcscpy calls without bounds checking, unchecked subscript access with parameter indices. Simplified from Rust per D-07: flags all call_expression nodes (cannot filter by function name or verify subscript index origin without deep AST analysis).

flag.message: Function call detected -- verify unsafe C string functions (strcpy, strcat, sprintf, gets, wcscpy, wcscat) are not used; prefer safe alternatives (strncpy, snprintf, std::string). Verify array subscript access with parameter indices uses .at() for bounds checking.
